title: Detective Noir Interface Overhaul
description: Unify the entire platform (Board, Evidence Viewer, Profile, Scoreboard, and AI Advisor) into a high-fidelity Pixel-Perfect game aesthetic.

title: Vite Bundle Optimization
description: Optimize chunk sizes to resolve the 500kB minification warning.

value: Project Architecture: Node/Express + Supabase (PostgreSQL) + Socket.IO. Core mechanisms: Patrick Jane (AI Consultant) and The Adversary (Engagement NPC). Mandatory rebase-push workflow as per AGENTS.md. Session Hand-off: Interface unified (Board, Viewer, Profile, Scoreboard, Advisor). Environment: Windows/PowerShell.
